content: Amazon interview focused heavily on Leadership Principles and DSA. Questions: LRU Cache, Binary Tree Level Order Traversal. Tips: Use the STAR method for behavioral questions.
Google interview was purely technical. System design for a global rate limiter. DSA: Find median in a stream of integers. Focus on time complexity and edge cases.
TCS Digital interview covered OOPs, SQL Joins, and basic Array problems. They asked about polymorphism and abstraction with real-world examples.
AWS focused interview. Questions on VPC peering, S3 bucket policies, and migration strategies. Mentioned CAP theorem and eventual consistency.
